variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17471 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17471 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17471 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 92.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 70.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 61.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 179.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 174.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 168.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P776895 Air Filter, Safety | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17471
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P776895 Air Filter, Safety | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17471
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Safety Filters? Safety filters have two functions: to act as a backup to the primary filter and to protect the engine during primary filter servicing. • Serve as a backup filter in case of primary filter damage or improper installation. • Prevent contaminants from entering the clean side of the air intake system during primary filter servicing. • Designed to plug rapidly if contamination finds its way past the primary filter, alerting operators about an issue. • Recommend that safety filters are replaced with every third primary filter change unless there has been a failure of the primary filter.

variants.title: Mann Filter CF 84 x Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17471
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter CF 84 x Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17471
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filter secondary elements offer a comprehensive protection against wear / Engine is protected even if the main filter component is replaced or damaged. While the main element is being replaced, extreme or dusty operating conditions can sometimes occur - the secondary element continues to provide optimum protection for a clean air.
specifications: Style: Secondary Element, Dimension A: 93.0 mm, Dimension B: 61.0 mm, Dimension C: 17.0 mm, Dimension D: 71.0 mm, Dimension H: 180.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25529 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17471
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25529 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17471
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25529 axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
